consoleMessages: [ERROR] Access to XMLHttpRequest blocked by CORS policy
result.summary: The fallback mechanism is working correctly. When the CDN request fails due to CORS, the system falls back to local SVG files at 'assets/cenlib-map/Floor_X.SVG'. The actual library floor plan SVG (129KB) was loaded successfully showing Hebrew labels for Reading Room A, entrance, and collections. The target shelves 18B and 19A were correctly highlighted.
